final_prompt.prompt:
Design a vertical short-video cover for an 8k GGU esports monitor launch, intended for Douyin / TikTok feed scroll impact, with the minimalist restraint of premium tech branding.

Style/medium: vertical short-video cover with the quiet authority of premium tech product launches, designed for thumb-stopping clarity
Composition: rule-of-thirds layout with bold headline anchored in the upper third, negative space breathing below, product silhouette or subtle graphic element grounding the lower third
Subject: 8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz as the hero headline, with supporting claim "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" as secondary text
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: the confident stillness of a product reveal, a held breath before the announcement
Color palette: neutral graphite and cool dusk tones, the tension between matte black and one accent highlight
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz, 全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩
Constraints: vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, headline must dominate visual hierarchy, all text legible at thumbnail size, minimalist restraint with no decorative noise
Avoid: cluttered information, multiple competing headlines, decorative gradients that fight the text, busy backgrounds, stuffer words like "8K quality" or "masterpiece"
